title: flagich1 modpack
description: Do you think that Minecraft is raw? But you like "Vanilla" without mods like "magic" or RPG? I can change that! This modpack is created for ordinary gameplay but with special features.
body:
Do you think that Minecraft is raw? But you like "Vanilla" without mods like "magic" or RPG?
I can change that! This modpack is created for ordinary gameplay but with special features.
What hapends when you go to play? Go to play and see new features, from Sodium to Axiom.
  
[BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3/version/7.0.2) (Improves the F3)
  
[Explosive Enhancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/explosive-enhancement/version/1.2.2-1.20.x) (Adds explosion effects)

[ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod/version/1.20.1-2.6.15) (Capture your game content while you play)
[Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom/version/2.8.1) (Helps in designing buildings, single world)

And some else
